svg.text: Aurora Region B · placement view — what runs in CML vs locally on PC1/Dell
CML = Cisco native + ONE BYOI (vJunos). Non-Cisco CEs + IXP + RPKI run locally and reach the CML PEs over the PC1 openconnect bridge. Transits stay in Region A.
REGION A · local Dell GNS3 (Internet edge stays here)
PC1 / Dell · bridge · PC1 Docker · local non-Cisco CEs
REGION B · CML reservation (Cisco native + vJunos BYOI)
Local CEs reach Region B PEs over the bridge (PE-CE eBGP) —
no per-reservation CML upload. Aruba is local L2 behind PA-VM (no GRE).
8 Cisco nodes (native) + JNX-P (vJunos, the one BYOI). HH-CE / vSRX / Aruba are bridged in.
DC-P x2, MR/HH PE pairs, MR-CE
Dashed = control-plane over the bridge · gold dashed border = BYOI · gold solid border = route-reflector
Only vJunos is a per-reservation CML upload (it can't boot on the triple-nested Dell). Everything else non-Cisco runs locally and bridges in.
aurora-comms · ops/region-b-cml/ (topology · addressing · MOP) · ADR-002 §3.2/§3.2.4 · ADR-003 §2.3 · PROPOSED — ratify before deploy
